title: rubus mesogaeus
intro: Rubus mesogaeus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus mesogaeus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Rubus mesogaeus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
